summary: The ND Miata continues the tradition of simplicity and reliability. The Skyactiv 2.0L engine is proven and efficient. Very few significant issues have been reported in the ownership community.

issues.name: Weak Air Conditioning
issues.description: The ND Miata's AC system struggles to cool the cabin in hot weather, especially with the top down. The small compressor and cabin insulation are factors.

issues.name: Soft Top Mechanism (RF)
issues.description: The RF (Retractable Fastback) model's power hard top mechanism can develop slow operation or intermittent faults as it ages.

issues.name: Clutch Chatter
issues.description: Some ND Miatas develop clutch chatter during engagement, particularly from a cold start. Often goes away as the clutch warms up.

issues.name: Infotainment Connectivity Issues
issues.description: The Mazda Connect infotainment system can have Bluetooth pairing issues and occasional lag. Software updates help.

buyingTips: The ND is one of the most reliable sports cars you can buy — very few mechanical concerns
2019+ models received the more powerful 181hp 2.0L engine — a worthwhile upgrade over the earlier 155hp version
The soft top model is lighter and simpler than the RF — but the RF looks stunning and is quieter at highway speeds
Check the soft top for proper operation and any signs of wear if buying a used cloth-top model
The ND Miata depreciates slowly — well-maintained examples hold their value exceptionally well
